title: Apache Config Error
description: Apache2 is down after a config change. A typo in an included config file prevents the server from starting.
lesson: Always run apachectl configtest before restarting Apache in production.
hint_2: read the broken file pointed to in the error
hint_3: find the typo — ServerNaame is not a valid directive
hint_4: fix and restart: sed -i + apache2ctl start
fail: apache2 is still down or config is still invalid.
